snippet.title: A.L.A  - MOVE (en collaboration avec ALLCHESTRA)
snippet.description:
Ce clip est l'Г©pisode 01 Du projet crescendo, menГ© par l'association
WALLAH WE CAN qui a pour objectif de financier un centre d'accueil
pour les enfants victimes de violences.

snippet.title: Adham Nabulsi - Ommi (Lyric Video) | ШЈШҜЩҮЩ… ЩҶШ§ШЁЩ„ШіЩҠ - ШЈЩ…ЩҠ
snippet.description:
Adham Nabulsi - Ommi (Lyric Video) | ШЈШҜЩҮЩ… ЩҶШ§ШЁЩ„ШіЩҠ - ШЈЩ…ЩҠ

Written & Composed: Adham Nabulsi
Music: Joseph Demerjian
Mix & Mastering: Red Ramp
Animation Director: Raed Al Murish

Artist Manager: Josiane El Khoury


ШЈЩҶШӘЩҗ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҸШ¶Щ’ЩҶЩҸ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ‘Ш§ЩҒЩҗШҰ 
ШЈЩҶШӘЩҗ ШЈШӯЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҺШ®Ш§ШЁЩҗШҰ 
ЩҠШ§ ШЈЩҸЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҠШ§ ШЈЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ

ШЈЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҠШ§ ЩҶЩҺШЁЩ’Ш№ЩҺ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҺЩҶШ§ЩҶЩ’
ШЁЩҗШӯЩҸШ¶Щ’ЩҶЩҗЩғЩҗ ШЈШҙЩ’Ш№ЩҸШұЩҸ ШЁЩҗШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩ’
 ШЈЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҠШ§ ЩҶЩҺШЁЩ’Ш№ЩҺ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҺЩҶШ§ЩҶЩ’
ШЁЩҗШӯЩҸШ¶Щ’ЩҶЩҗЩғЩҗ ЩҶЩҺШҙЩ’Ш№ЩҸШұЩҸ ШЁЩҗШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩ’
ЩҶЩҺШӘЩҺШ№ЩҺЩ„Щ‘ЩҺЩ…ЩҸ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’ЩғЩҗ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҺШ·Щ’ЩҒЩҺ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩ’ 
ЩҲЩҶЩҺЩҒЩ’ЩҮЩҺЩ…ЩҸ Щ…ЩҺШ№ЩҶЩү Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш·Щ…ЩҗШҰЩҶШ§ЩҶЩ’ 

ШЈЩ…Щ‘ЩҠЩ’ ШЈЩҶШӘЩҗ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ‘ЩҸЩҶЩҠШ§ ЩҲЩҺ Щ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҗЩҠЩҮШ§
ШӯЩҸШЁЩ‘ЩҸЩғЩҗ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҒЩҗШ·Щ’ШұЩҺШ©Щ’ 

ШЈЩҶШӘЩҗ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҸШ¶Щ’ЩҶЩҸ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ‘Ш§ЩҒЩҗШҰ 
ШЈЩҶШӘЩҗ ШЈШӯЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҺШ®Ш§ШЁЩҗШҰ 
ЩҠШ§ ШЈЩҸЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҠШ§ ШЈЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ

Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҺШӯЩ’ШІЩҺЩҶЩҠ ЩҠШ§ ШЈЩҸЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ
 ЩҒЩҺШӯЩҸШЁЩ‘ЩҸЩғЩҗ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҺЩ…ЩҗЩҠ
ЩҲЩ…ЩҺЩҮЩ’Щ…Ш§ ЩғЩҺШЁЩҸШұЩ’ШӘЩҸ
 ШӘЩҺШӯЩ’Щ…ЩҗЩ„ЩҠЩҶЩҺ ЩҮЩҺЩ…Щ‘ЩҠЩҺ



ШЈЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҠШ§ ЩҶЩҺШЁЩ’Ш№ЩҺ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҺЩҶШ§ЩҶЩ’

snippet.title: Addison Rae - Obsessed (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
The official music video for Addison Rae вҖ“ Obsessed 
 
Stream Obsessed: https://ingroov.es/obsessed
 
Follow Addison:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/addisonraee
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@addisonre
Twitter: https://twitter.com/whoisaddison
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/addisonrae
  
Directed by Diane Martel 
Produced by Missy Galanida
Executive Producer: Missy Galanida and Isaac Rice
Director of Photography: Chris Soos
Color & Title Design: Tim Masick
Edited by: Jeremy Maneval
Choreographer: Calvit Hodge
Assistant Choreographer: Sara Biv
Director rep: Missy Galanida/Isaac Rice
 
Addison Rae Team: 
Director: Diane Martel
https://www.instagram.com/dianemartel_/
 
Photographer: Marcus Cooper 
https://www.instagram.com/marcuscooper/
 
Makeup: Mary Phillips
https://www.instagram.com/maryphillips/
 
Hair: Jenny Cho 
https://www.instagram.com/jennychohair/
 
Nails: Thuy Nguyen 
https://www.instagram.com/thuymusic/
 
Styling: Kyle Luu 
https://www.instagram.com/kyleluu/
 
Choreography: Calvit & Sara 
https://www.instagram.com/calvitjr/
https://www.instagram.com/sarabivcalvitarg/
 
Lyrics:
You turned our song down baby what for 
You had lit candles on the dashboard 
Red roses growing out of the door 
Wanna say something ya never said before 
 
We were driving down sunset
You know I like fast cars
Past by where we first met 
Damn we made it so far 
Red eyes from
The red light 
And that just set the mood 
You said youвҖҷre obsessed w me and I took a second and said me too 
 
Im obsessed w me-e-e as much as u 
Said youвҖҷd die for me IвҖҷd die for me-e too 
If I lost you IвҖҷd still have me I canвҖҷt lose
When you say that youвҖҷre obsessed w me, me too 
 
I did my hair like waves on the beach
This dress so tight you canвҖҷt even speak
My heels so high you might get a nose bleed
MusicвҖҷs so loud but I hear your heartbeat 

#Obsessed

ЩҲЩғШЁШұШӘ ШЁЩӮЩҠШӘ Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҮЩҲШұ .. ЩҲЩҶШ¬Ш§ШӯЩү ЩғЩ„ЩҮ ШұШ¶Ш§ЩҮШ§
ЩҠШ§ ШҙЩ…ШіЩү ЩҲШ¶Щ„Щү ЩҲЩӮЩ…ШұЩү .. ЩҠШ§ ЩҒЩ„Щү ЩҲЩҲШұШҜЩү ЩҲШ№Ш·ШұЩү
ЩҠШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұ ШЁЩҠШіШ№ШҜ ЩҶШёШұЩү .. Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩү ЩҲЩ„Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҮШ§
ШіШұ Ш§ШЁШҜШ§Ш№Щү ЩҲЩҶШ¬Ш§ШӯЩү .. ЩҲЩ…Ш№Ш§ЩҮШ§ ЩғЩ„ Ш§ЩҒШұШ§ШӯЩү

ШӯШЁЩғ ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ…Щү .. ШЁЩҠШ¬ШұЩү ЩҒЩү ШҜЩ…Щү
ШіЩҶШҜЩү ЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ЩҲШ№ШІЩ…Щү .. Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШҙ ЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ШіЩҲШ§ЩғЩү
Щ„ЩҲ ЩҮЩҲШөЩҒ ШӯШЁЩғ .. ЩҲШӯЩҶШ§ЩҶЩғ ЩҲЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ 
ШҜЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠЩҮ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜЩҮ ЩҒЩү ЩӮШұШЁЩғ ШӘШіЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ЩҲЩҠШ§ЩғЩү

ШЁШӘШөЩ„Щү ЩҲШӘШҜШ№Щү Щ„ЩҠШ§ .. ЩғЩ„ЩҮШ§ ШӯШЁ ЩҲШӯЩҶЩҠЩҮ
Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„Щү ЩғЩ„ЩҮШ§ ЩӮЩҲЩҠЩҮ .. ЩҲШҜЩҮ ЩғЩ„ЩҮ ШЁЩҒШ¶Щ„ ШҜШ№Ш§ЩҮШ§
ЩҠШ§ ШӯШЁЩҠШЁЩҮ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ…Щү .. ШҜЩҮ ШұШ¶Ш§ЩғЩү ШҜЩҮ ЩғЩ„ ЩҮЩ…Щү
ШҜЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩү ЩҒЩү ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩү ЩҶШ№Щ…ЩҮ .. ЩҲШ¬ЩҶЩҮ Ш№Ш§ЩҠШҙ ШЁШіЩ…Ш§ЩҮШ§

ШӯШЁЩғ ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ…Щү .. ШЁЩҠШ¬ШұЩү ЩҒЩү ШҜЩ…Щү
ШіЩҶШҜЩү ЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ЩҲШ№ШІЩ…Щү .. Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШҙ ЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ШіЩҲШ§ЩғЩү
Щ„ЩҲ ЩҮЩҲШөЩҒ ШӯШЁЩғ .. ЩҲШӯЩҶШ§ЩҶЩғ ЩҲЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ 
ШҜЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠЩҮ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜЩҮ ЩҒЩү ЩӮШұШЁЩғ ШӘШіЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ЩҲЩҠШ§ЩғЩү

snippet.title: Barcelona vs Huesca | LALIGA HIGHLIGHTS | 3/15/2021 | beIN SPORTS USA
snippet.description:
Barcelona won 4-1 at home against Huesca in a decisive match in its race to LaLiga title. Messi with a brace (13' & 90'), Antoine Griezmann at 35', and Oscar Mingueza at 53' scored for the Culers, while Rafa Mir sealed the lone goal for Huesca via penalty kick. With this result, Barcelona is only 4 points behind AtlГ©tico Madrid, the current leader of the table.

With this result, Barcelona is only 4 points behind AtlГ©tico Madrid, the current leader of the table.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвҖӢвҖӢ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вҖӢвҖӢ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвҖӢвҖӢ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвҖӢвҖӢ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвҖӢвҖӢ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвҖӢвҖӢ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвҖӢвҖӢ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

snippet.title: SCH - Loup Noir | A COLORS SHOW
snippet.description:
French rapper Julien Schwarzer aka @SCH shares a performance of cinematic new song "Loup Noir"

New COLORS Apparel out now: https://shop.colorsxstudios.com

Follow
в–¶ Stream: https://colors.lnk.to/allshowscxs
в–¶ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/schmathafack
в–¶ Instagram: https://instagram.com/sch
вҖ”
Follow COLORS:
в–¶ COLORS Apparel: https://colors.lnk.to/shopcxs
в–¶ On Socials: https://lnk.to/socials
в–¶ On Spotify: https://colors.lnk.to/Spotify
в–¶ On Apple Music: https://colors.lnk.to/applemusic
в–¶ On the Web: https://colorsxstudios.com

COLORSXSTUDIOS is a unique aesthetic music platform showcasing exceptional talent from around the globe. COLORS focuses on the most distinctive new artists and original sounds in an increasingly fragmented and saturated scene. All COLORS shows seek to provide clear, minimalistic stage that shines a spotlight on the artists, giving them the opportunity to present their music without distraction.

LOUP NOIR 
LYRICS

Les sourires et les faux semblants 
Et quelques gouttes ont suffit 
A lвҖҷГ©lixir pour ГӘtre mortel 
Que des caisses noires dans le cortГЁge 
Des 3-piГЁces et des longs impers qui cachent les guitares 
Des reufs  au mitard 
Les faits divers en hiver 
JвҖҷai fait 100 000 avant le mis-per  

JвҖҷmвҖҷentraГ®ne Г  sourire devant la glace 
JвҖҷmвҖҷentraГ®ne Г  souffrir sans remГЁde 
Le petite maison est en ruine 
Quand la faim pense, 
le coeur est en grГЁve 
La vie cвҖҷest mener les bons choix 
LвҖҷimage vient sans mГӘme une esquisse 
Dans le dos les schlass traversent la redskins
La trahison des gens quвҖҷon estime 
JвҖҷai pas vu pГЁre fermer les paupiГЁres 
TГӘte dans le guidon cвҖҷГ©tait le frigo 
Une chienne de vie Г  se lever aux aurores 
JвҖҷaurai jamais su comment faire 
JвҖҷaurai jamais su comment perdre 
Avec la haine de ceux quвҖҷon enferme  

Et quand les yeux se ferment et que tout est noir 
Quand les mots se perdent 
Tu veux  tuer un homme 
Prend du Sky et des faux espoirs 
Et quand les mГҙmes se perdent 
Dans les sinueux couloirs des enfers 
On sera de retour 2 minutes avant 
Que les revolvers leur jouent du tonnerre 
LвҖҷorage est parti oГ№ est le soleil 
Mon deuil nвҖҷest pas fait oГ№ est mon sommeilВ 

JвҖҷparle de vraies choses quвҖҷon vit ici 
De vrais flingues quвҖҷon a tenu
DвҖҷun vrai sang qui sвҖҷest versГ©
De la seule femme qui mвҖҷa bercГ© 
De vrais potes quвҖҷon a perdus 

Des pensГ©es noires et des nuits blanches 
Des armes des enfants terribles 
Le bГ©ton le bruit du ciment 
LГ  oГ№ on veut pas finir intГ©rim 
Des gens mвҖҷont trahi jвҖҷai la nausГ©e 
JвҖҷdГ©pose un flingue et quelques roses 
Sur le verso dвҖҷun livre usГ© 
ГүnumГ©rer ce que jвҖҷy ai laissГ© 
Prendre un maximum pour papa 
Comme si jвҖҷallais le faire renaГ®tre 
DвҖҷentre les morts comme un Dieu grec 
Tous les bleus que jвҖҷai autour du coeur 
Tous ces billets froissГ©s dans mon sac 
Trop jeune pour embrasser le plomb 
Mais trop jeune pour vivre tout Г§a 
Des borsalino dans la nuit 
Des portes flingues tournent dans la ville 
Du sang Г  Г©ponger dans la cuisine 
Des billets qui flottent dans la piscine 
Little Italy Corleone sous Michael 
Marie Curie dans la compteuse
LГ  oГ№ le ventre est le prompteur 

La faim justifie la violence 
LГ  oГ№ la violence est la rГ©ponse 
LГ  oГ№ la violence est le moteur 
LГ  oГ№ la violence est le docteur 
Vivons cachГ©s vivons gantГ©s 
faisons le tour du monde entier 
Avant quвҖҷune balle nous arrГӘte 
J.V.L.I.V.S

#colors #SCH #loupnoir

snippet.description:

Every day every night

Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IвҖҷm never coming down

Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground

snippet.title: "ЩҮШ§ШӘШұЩҠЩғ" ЩғШұЩҠШіШӘЩҠШ§ЩҶЩҲ ЩҠЩӮЩҲШҜ ЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҶШӘЩҲШі Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҲШІ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠ | Щ…Щ„Ш®Шө Щ…ШЁШ§ШұШ§Ш© ЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠ ЩҲЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҶШӘЩҲШі
snippet.description:
Ш№Ш§ШҜ ЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҶШӘЩҲШі Щ…ЩҶ ШұШӯЩ„Ш© Ш¬ШІЩҠШұШ© ШіШұШҜЩҠЩҶЩҠШ§ ШЁЩҒЩҲШІ Щ…ШіШӘШӯЩӮ ШЈЩ…Ш§Щ… ЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠ 3-1 Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲЩ„Ш© 27 Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҠШ·Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Щ„ЩғШұШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜЩ….
ЩҲШӘЩ…ЩҠЩ‘ШІ "Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩҶ" ЩғШұЩҠШіШӘЩҠШ§ЩҶЩҲ ШұЩҲЩҶШ§Щ„ШҜЩҲ ШЁШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠШ© "ЩҮШ§ШӘШұЩҠЩғ" (10 ЩҲ25 Щ…ЩҶ ШұЩғЩ„Ш© Ш¬ШІШ§ШЎ ЩҲ32) ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© ШЁЩ„Шә ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШӘШәШ§Щ„ЩҠ 600 Щ…ШЁШ§ШұШ§Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШөШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҜШұШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШ©. 
ЩҲЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩҲЩ„ "ЩҮШ§ШӘШұЩҠЩғ" Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҮШ§Ш¬Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШӘШәШ§Щ„ЩҠ Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬ ШЈШұШ¶ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ ЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҶШӘЩҲШі ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ ШЁШ№ШҜ ШЈЩҶ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ ШЈЩ…Ш§Щ… ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ЩҒШі ЩҠЩҲЩ… 6 ЩҠЩҶШ§ЩҠШұ 2020.

localized.title: "ЩҮШ§ШӘШұЩҠЩғ" ЩғШұЩҠШіШӘЩҠШ§ЩҶЩҲ ЩҠЩӮЩҲШҜ ЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҶШӘЩҲШі Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҲШІ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠ | Щ…Щ„Ш®Шө Щ…ШЁШ§ШұШ§Ш© ЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠ ЩҲЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҶШӘЩҲШі

ЩҲШӘЩ…ЩҠЩ‘ШІ "Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩҶ" ЩғШұЩҠШіШӘЩҠШ§ЩҶЩҲ ШұЩҲЩҶШ§Щ„ШҜЩҲ ШЁШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠШ© "ЩҮШ§ШӘШұЩҠЩғ" (10 ЩҲ25 Щ…ЩҶ ШұЩғЩ„Ш© Ш¬ШІШ§ШЎ ЩҲ32) ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© ШЁЩ„Шә ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШӘШәШ§Щ„ЩҠ 600 Щ…ШЁШ§ШұШ§Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШөШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҜШұШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШ©. 
ЩҲЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩҲЩ„ "ЩҮШ§ШӘШұЩҠЩғ" Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҮШ§Ш¬Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШӘШәШ§Щ„ЩҠ Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬ ШЈШұШ¶ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ ЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҶШӘЩҲШі ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ ШЁШ№ШҜ ШЈЩҶ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ ШЈЩ…Ш§Щ… ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ЩҒШі ЩҠЩҲЩ… 6 ЩҠЩҶШ§ЩҠШұ 2020.

snippet.title: Free Fire x Cristiano Ronaldo | ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ·ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠ
snippet.description:
ШЈЩҠЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ш¬ЩҲЩҶ! 

ЩҮЩ„ Щ„Ш§ШӯШёШӘ ШҘШӯШҜЩү Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ·ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ ЩғШұЩҠШіШӘЩҠШ§ЩҶЩҲ ШұЩҲЩҶШ§Щ„ШҜЩҲ x ЩҒШұЩҠ ЩҒШ§ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩ…Щ„Ш«Ш© ШЁШҙШ®ШөЩҠШ© ЩғШұЩҲЩҶЩҲШҹ 

ЩҮЩ„ ШӯШөЩ„ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү ШҙШ®ШөЩҠШ© ЩғШұЩҲЩҶЩҲ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҒШ№Щ„Шҹ 

ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ Щ…ЩҶЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ШўЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬Шұ ЩҲШЈШӯШөЩ„ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ Щ„ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШӘЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩғШ©! 

#ЩғЩҶ_Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ·ЩҲШұШ©  #ЩҒШұЩҠ_ЩҒШ§ЩҠШұ #ЩҒШұЩҠ_ЩҒШ§ЩҠШұ_ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠ #Ш§Щ”Щ„Ш№ШЁ_Щ…ЩҶ_Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ #ШЁШ§ШӘЩ„_ШұЩҲЩҠШ§Щ„ #ЩғШұЩҠШіШӘЩҠШ§ЩҶЩҲ_ШұЩҲЩҶШ§Щ„ШҜЩҲ #ЩғШұЩҠШіШӘЩҠШ§ЩҶЩҲ_ШұЩҲЩҶШ§Щ„ШҜЩҲ_ЩҒЩҠ_ЩҒШұЩҠ_ЩҒШ§ЩҠШұ
#BeTheLegend #CR7 #CristianoRonaldo #Games #BattleRoyal #OperationChrono #CR7XFreeFire

ЩҲШҙЩҮЩӮШ§ШӘ ШөШҜШұЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩғЩҠ Щ…Ш§ ШӘШіЩ…Ш№ЩҠ 
ЩҲШӯШӘЩү ШҘШ°Ш§ ШӯЩҶЩҠШӘЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШұШ¬Ш№ЩҠ

ШЁЩҠЩғЩҒЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШӘЩҲШ¬Ш№ШӘ Щ…Ш§ ШӘШӘЩҲШ¬Ш№ЩҠ
Ш№ЩҠШҙЩҠ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩғ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҮЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ШӘЩ…ШӘШ№ЩҠ
ШөШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ ЩӮЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ЩҠЩ„Ш§ ШӘШҙШ¬Ш№ЩҠ

ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШәЩҶЩҠШ© :
Щ…ШҜШ§Щ… Щ„ЩҮЩҶШ§ Ш№ЩҶЩҠ ШЁШ№ЩҠШҜ ШұШӯ ЩӮЩҲЩ„Ш§ ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш© ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШұШӯ Ш№ЩҠШҜ Щ„Ш§ШІЩ… ШӘШӘШ·Щ„Ш№ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…Щғ  Щ…Ш§ШЁЩӮЩү ЩҠЩҮЩ…ЩҶЩҠ 
ШӯШӘЩү Щ„ЩҲ ШЁЩғЩҠШӘ Ш№ЩҠЩҶЩҠ ШӯШӘЩү Щ„ЩҲ ЩҶШҙЩҒ ШҜЩ…ЩҠ 
_____________
ШұШӯ ШЈЩҶШіШ§ЩғЩҠ. ШұШӯ ЩғЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩ„Ш§ЩғЩҠ  Щ…Ш§ШЁШҜЩҠ ЩҠШ§ЩғЩҠ 
Ш·Щ„Ш№ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶЩҠ 
ШЁШі Щ…Ш§ ШӘШӘШІШ§ЩғЩҠ ЩҲШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҠ Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩғЩҠ Щ…Ш§ШЁШҜЩҠ ЩҠШ§ЩғЩҠ ШӯЩ„ЩҠ Ш№ЩҶЩҠ 
_________________

Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШӯШЁЩҠШӘЩғ ЩҲШәШҜШұШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠ  ЩҲШ·Ш№ЩҶШӘЩҠ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ШЁШіЩғЩҠЩҶШ©
Щ…Ш§ШӘШ¬ЩҠ ЩҲШӘШӘШұШ¬ЩҠЩҶЩҠ ЩҲШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ Щ…ШіЩғЩҠЩҶШ© ШӯШЁЩғ Щ…Ш§ШЁЩӮЩү ЩҠШ№ЩҠЩҶЩҠ ЩӮШіЩҲШ© ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘЩҠЩ„ЩҠ 
______________

ШұШӯ ШЈЩҶШіШ§ЩғЩҠ. ШұШӯ ЩғЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩ„Ш§ЩғЩҠ  Щ…Ш§ШЁШҜЩҠ ЩҠШ§ЩғЩҠ 
Ш·Щ„Ш№ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶЩҠ 
ШЁШі Щ…Ш§ ШӘШӘШІШ§ЩғЩҠ ЩҲШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҠ Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩғЩҠ Щ…Ш§ШЁШҜЩҠ

Lyrics | ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ

"Щ…ШӘЩ„ ЩҮШ§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ ШҘЩҶШӘ ШЁШӘЩғШЁШұ ШіЩҶШ©

Щ„ЩҲ ЩҒЩҠЩҠ Ш№ЩҶЩғ Ш§ШӘЩ…ЩҶЩү ЩҲШ§ШҜШ№ЩҠ Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ ЩҠШӘЩҮЩҶЩү Щ…Ш№ ШәЩҠШұЩҠ ШЈЩҶШ§

ЩҲШӘШ¶Щ„Щ‘Щғ ЩҮЩҠЩғ ЩҠШ§ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҠ ШЈШӯЩ„Щү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„ ШЁШ№ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠ 
ЩҲШӘЩ„Ш§ЩӮЩҠ ШӯШҜШ© Щ…ШӘЩ„Щғ Щ…Ш№ ШҘЩҶЩҲ ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ Щ…ШӘЩ„Щғ Ш®Щ„ШөЩҲШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠ 

Щ…Ш§ ШЁШөШҜЩӮ ШҘЩҶЩғ Ш°Ш§ЩғШұШӘЩҠ ЩҲЩ…Шҙ Щ…ЩҶ ШӯЩӮЩҠ Ш§ШӘШ°ЩғШұЩғ 
ШҘЩҶШӘ ШЈШәЩ„Щү Щ…Ш§ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҠ ЩҲШәШөШЁ Ш№ЩҶЩҠ Ш№Щ… ШҘШ®ШіШұЩғ"

Ш§ЩҶШ§ Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩғЩҗ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩҗ .. ШҙЩҲ ШЁШіЩҲЩү ЩҠШ§Щ…Ш§Щ…Ш§



ШӘШұШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШЁШӘШҜЩҲШіЩҠ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ Щ…ЩҶЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҮШұ ШЁЩҒЩҲШӯ

ШЁШӯШ¶ЩҶЩғ ШЁШӘШ·ЩҠШЁ Ш¬ШұЩҲШӯШ§ШӘЩҠ Щ„ЩҲЩғЩҶШӘ Щ…Ш¬ШұЩҲШӯ

ШЁШӘШҙЩҮШҜЩ„Щғ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШҜШ© .. ШҙЩҲШіЩҮШұШ§ЩҶШ© ШӯШҜЩҠ

ЩғШЁШұШӘ ЩҲЩҮЩ„ЩӮ ШЁШҜЩҠ .. ЩӮШҜЩ…Щ„Щғ ЩҮШ§Щ„ШұЩҲШӯ 



ЩғЩҒЩҠШӘЩҠ ЩҲЩҲЩҒЩҠШӘЩҠ ..ЩғШЁШұШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠ ЩҲШӯШ¶ЩҶЩғ ШЁЩҠШӘЩҠ 

ЩғЩ„Щ‘ЩҶ ЩҒЩ„Щ‘ЩҲШ§ ..ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘЩҠ ШЁЩӮЩҠШӘЩҠ ШӘШ®ШЁЩҠЩ„ЩҠ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ ШЈШіШұШ§Шұ

ЩҮЩ„ЩӮ ШҜЩҲШұЩҠ ШөШ§Шұ 



ШЈЩ…ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШіЩҮШұШӘ ШӘ ЩҶЩҶШ§Щ… ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШәЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҒЩҶШ§

ЩғЩҒЩҠШӘЩҠ ЩҲЩҲЩҒЩҠШӘЩҠ ..ЩғШЁШұШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠ ЩҲШӯШ¶ЩҶЩғ ШЁЩҠШӘЩҠ

snippet.title: Ali Gatie - Can't Let You Go [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Watch the official music video for Can't Let You Go by Ali Gatie. 
рҹ”” Subscribe to the channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/aligatie?sub_confirmation=1
Listen to the brand new single by Ali Gatie here: https://aligatie.lnk.to/cantletyougo
Pre-save the upcoming EP 'The Idea of Her' releasing on March 26th now: https://aligatie.lnk.to/theideaofher

Follow Ali Gatie:
Web: https://www.aligatie.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/aligatie
Facebook: https://facebook.com/aligatie
Twitter: https://twitter.com/aligatie
Text ME !! 1313-800-8283

Ali Gatie is a singer-songwriter renowned for her hit songs вҖңItвҖҷs You,вҖқ вҖңWhat If I Told You That I Love You,вҖқ вҖңMoonlight,вҖқ вҖңRunning On My Mind,вҖқ вҖңUsed to You,вҖқ вҖңIf I Fall In Love,вҖқ and вҖңCanвҖҷt Lie.вҖқ He worked with artists like Russ, Alessia Cara, and Tate McRae вҖ” amassing billions of global streams and receiving international acclaim.

Lyrics:
I canвҖҷt let you go
Trust me IвҖҷve tried and
I swear IвҖҷm still trying to know 
How to move on
If somebody told me
I still wouldnвҖҷt know where to go
IвҖҷd follow the stars 
Wish I could see them - the sky feels so dark when youвҖҷre gone
IвҖҷd follow my heart - but you took it with you the day you walked out of that door 

No I canвҖҷt pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means I should forget 

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
I wouldnвҖҷt ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

You gave me hope 
Something to hold on - and look forward for 
And after it all - you left me with me scars and said that you were never involved 

You knew I was weak 
You sold me a dream and knew I would believe in your lies 
WhatвҖҷs wrong with me? 
I knew you were lying
But I had no courage to leave
And I canвҖҷt pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means that I should forget

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
It wouldnвҖҷt even matter anyway 

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
I wouldnвҖҷt ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya Albeh ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh
Khaleeneh ma3ak
Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya omri ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh
I canвҖҷt let you go

#OfficialMusicVideo #AliGatie #CantLetYouGo #WeAreWarnerRecords

And I canвҖҷt pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means that I should forget

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
It wouldnвҖҷt even matter anyway 

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
I wouldnвҖҷt ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya Albeh ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh
Khaleeneh ma3ak
Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya omri ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh
I canвҖҷt let you go

en.title: Ali Gatie - Can't Let You Go [Official Music Video]
en.description:
Watch the official music video for Can't Let You Go by Ali Gatie. 
рҹ”” Subscribe to the channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/aligatie?sub_confirmation=1
Listen to the brand new single by Ali Gatie here: https://aligatie.lnk.to/cantletyougo
Pre-save the upcoming EP 'The Idea of Her' releasing on March 26th now: https://aligatie.lnk.to/theideaofher

Follow Ali Gatie:
Web: https://www.aligatie.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/aligatie
Facebook: https://facebook.com/aligatie
Twitter: https://twitter.com/aligatie
Text ME !! 1313-800-8283

Ali Gatie is a singer-songwriter renowned for her hit songs вҖңItвҖҷs You,вҖқ вҖңWhat If I Told You That I Love You,вҖқ вҖңMoonlight,вҖқ вҖңRunning On My Mind,вҖқ вҖңUsed to You,вҖқ вҖңIf I Fall In Love,вҖқ and вҖңCanвҖҷt Lie.вҖқ He worked with artists like Russ, Alessia Cara, and Tate McRae вҖ” amassing billions of global streams and receiving international acclaim.

Lyrics:
I canвҖҷt let you go
Trust me IвҖҷve tried and
I swear IвҖҷm still trying to know 
How to move on
If somebody told me
I still wouldnвҖҷt know where to go
IвҖҷd follow the stars 
Wish I could see them - the sky feels so dark when youвҖҷre gone
IвҖҷd follow my heart - but you took it with you the day you walked out of that door 

No I canвҖҷt pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means I should forget 

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
I wouldnвҖҷt ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

You gave me hope 
Something to hold on - and look forward for 
And after it all - you left me with me scars and said that you were never involved 

You knew I was weak 
You sold me a dream and knew I would believe in your lies 
WhatвҖҷs wrong with me? 
I knew you were lying
But I had no courage to leave
And I canвҖҷt pretend that you and I had never met 
If moving on means that I should forget

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
It wouldnвҖҷt even matter anyway 

Then even if I could I wouldnвҖҷt 
No matter what the price is I would pay 
DonвҖҷt matter if I should or shouldnвҖҷt 
I wouldnвҖҷt ever give up anyway 

Long nights of crying 
I felt like I was dying every night 
Rather keep on fighting 
At least then I got a reason to fight 

Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya Albeh ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh
Khaleeneh ma3ak
Khaleelekeh ma trouheh
Ya omri ya rouheh
Bkhabeekeh bejrouheh

Щ„ЩҲ Ш№Ш¬ШЁЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ§ рҹ‘Қ ЩҲЩ„ЩҲ Щ„ШіЩҮ Щ…Шҙ Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШҙШӘШұЩғЩҲШ§ ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© ЩҲЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҲШ§рҹ”” Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҠЩҲШөЩ„ЩғЩ… Ш§ШҙШ№Ш§Шұ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜЩҮ вқӨпёҸ ШҙЩғШұШ§ Щ„ШҜШ№Щ…ЩғЩ… рҹҘ°


Щ„ЩҠЩҶЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШіШӘШ¬ШұШ§Щ… ШЁШӘШ§Ш№Щү рҹҢҝрҹҢҝрҹҢҝрҹҢёрҹҢҝрҹҢҝрҹҢҝ

"ШөШЁЩ‘Ш§ШұШ©" ЩҮЩҲ ЩғЩ„ЩҠШЁ ЩҠШөШҜШұЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩ‘ЩҲШІЩҠ Ш§ШӯШӘЩҒШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШұШЈШ©Шӣ ЩҲШ§Ш№ШӘШұШ§ЩҒШ§ Щ„Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩӮШҜЩ…ЩҮ ЩҮШ§ШӘЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШ¶ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш¬ШіЩҠЩ…Ш© Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…ШұШ§ШӯЩ„ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮШ§. Ш§Щ„ШЈШәЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШұШӘ Щ„ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш¬ЩҠЩҶЩҠШұЩҠЩғ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәШұШЁЩҠ (ШЈЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШіЩү)ШҢ ЩҮЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ЩҠШіШӘШұЩҲ Ш¬Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ„ШӯЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ШҢ ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁШҜШ№ Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҲШ¶ЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„ЩҠШЁ ЩҠШ№ШұЩҒ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© ЩҶШ®ШЁШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШЁШ·Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ШҢ ЩҶШ°ЩғШұ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩҮЩ… Ш№ШІЩҠШІ ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШіШҢ Щ…Ш§Ш¬ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШұЩҠШіЩҠШҢ ШЈЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ш¬ЩҠШҢ ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ШЈЩӮШЁШ§ШЁ ,ЩғЩ„ЩҠЩ„Ш© ШЁЩҲЩҶШ№ЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШўШ®ШұЩҲЩҶ.. Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш°ЩғШұ ШЈЩҶ ШөШЁШ§ШұШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш¬Ш§ЩҶШЁ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ШЈЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШіЩүШҢ ЩҠШ№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш·ЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ЩӮШ§Щ„ШЁ ШҜШұШ§Щ…ЩҠ Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜ

  ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ Ш¬Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҠ

"ШөШЁЩ‘Ш§ШұШ©" ЩҮЩҲ ЩғЩ„ЩҠШЁ ЩҠШөШҜШұЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩ‘ЩҲШІЩҠ Ш§ШӯШӘЩҒШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШұШЈШ©Шӣ ЩҲШ§Ш№ШӘШұШ§ЩҒШ§ Щ„Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩӮШҜЩ…ЩҮ ЩҮШ§ШӘЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШ¶ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш¬ШіЩҠЩ…Ш© Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…ШұШ§ШӯЩ„ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮШ§. Ш§Щ„ШЈШәЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШұШӘ Щ„ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш¬ЩҠЩҶЩҠШұЩҠЩғ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәШұШЁЩҠ (ШЈЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШіЩү)ШҢ ЩҮЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ЩҠШіШӘШұЩҲ Ш¬Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ„ШӯЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ШҢ ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁШҜШ№ Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҲШ¶ЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„ЩҠШЁ ЩҠШ№ШұЩҒ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© ЩҶШ®ШЁШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШЁШ·Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ШҢ ЩҶШ°ЩғШұ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩҮЩ… Ш№ШІЩҠШІ ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШіШҢ Щ…Ш§Ш¬ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШұЩҠШіЩҠШҢ ШЈЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ш¬ЩҠШҢ ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ШЈЩӮШЁШ§ШЁ ,ЩғЩ„ЩҠЩ„Ш© ШЁЩҲЩҶШ№ЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШўШ®ШұЩҲЩҶ.. Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш°ЩғШұ ШЈЩҶ ШөШЁШ§ШұШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш¬Ш§ЩҶШЁ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ШЈЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШіЩүШҢ ЩҠШ№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш·ЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ЩӮШ§Щ„ШЁ ШҜШұШ§Щ…ЩҠ Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜ

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвҖҷt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвҖҷs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвҖҷ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвҖҷre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вҖ” or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

localized.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
localized.description:
Download NOW!! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвҖҷt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвҖҷs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвҖҷ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвҖҷre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вҖ” or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

http://supercell.com/en/parents/

ШЁШ·Щ„ Щ„Ш№ШЁ Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҲШұШ© Щ„ЩғЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШіШұШҙ Ш¬ЩҲЩ„Ш©  
ЩҮШӘЩҒЩғШұ ЩҠЩҲЩ… ШӘЩҶШ§ЩҒШіЩҮ Ш§ЩӮШ№ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғ ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү
 ШЈШұШ¶ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Щ…ШӯШёЩҲШұШ© ШЁШӘШҙШӘШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШӘШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш©
 ЩҲШЁШ·Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁЩҠЩҶ ШӯЩҲШ§Ш¬ШЁЩғ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШұШ¶Щғ ЩҮШіШӘЩҲЩ„Щү 
  Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щү ЩҶЩҒШіЩғ ШӘЩӮЩ„ШҜЩҮ
 Ш§Щү ШӯШҜ ШЁЩҠЩҮШұЩү ШЁШ§Ш¬Щү  ШЁШіЩғШӘЩҮ
Ш§ШӘШ®ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ЩҒЩҠЩғЩ… ШЁШөШЁШ§Ш№ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ Ш§Ш«ШЁШӘЩҮ
ШұЩ…Ш¶Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШі Щ…Ш¬ШұШҜ Ш§ШіЩ… ШЁЩҠШҙШӘШӘЩҮ 
Ш¬Щ…ЩҮЩҲШұЩү ЩҒЩү ЩҲШҜЩҶЩү ЩӮШ§Щ„Щү Ш§Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш§ЩҶЩҒШ¬Ш§Шұ
 Ш§ШҜШ§ЩҶЩү ШҘШҙШ§ШұШ© ЩҲ ЩӮШ§Щ„Щү ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Шұ
 Щ„ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ Щ…ШұШ© ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜШ© ШЁЩҠЩғЩ… ЩҲЩ„Ш№ШӘ
 Ш§Ш№ШұЩҒ ЩҠШ§ ШЁЩҶЩҠ ШҘЩҶЩү ШҜЩҲШіШӘ Ш№ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШІШұШ§Шұ
 Щ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щү ШЈШҜЩү Ш§ЩҶШӘ Ш§Ш®ШұЩғ ЩҠШ§Ш¶ ШӘШӘЩҒШұШ¬ 
 Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШөШ§ШӯШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш№ШЁ  ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘ ЩӮШ§Ш№ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШұШ¬ 
Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘ ШөШәЩҠШұ ШӯШ°ЩҲШұЩғ ЩғШӘЩҠШұ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ
 Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШҜ Щ…ЩҒШӘШұШі Щ…Шҙ ШЁЩҠЩҮШұШ¬

Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щү ЩҶЩҒШіЩғ ШӘЩӮЩ„ШҜЩҮ
 Ш§Щү ШӯШҜ ШЁЩҠЩҮШұЩү ШЁШ§Ш¬Щү  ШЁШіЩғШӘЩҮ
Ш§ШӘШ®ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ЩҒЩҠЩғЩ… ШЁШөШЁШ§Ш№ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ Ш§Ш«ШЁШӘЩҮ
ШұЩ…Ш¶Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШі Щ…Ш¬ШұШҜ Ш§ШіЩ… ШЁЩҠШҙШӘШӘЩҮ 

Щ…ШӘШӯШ·Шҙ ЩҶЩҒШіЩғ ЩӮШҜШ§Щ… ЩӮШ·Шұ Щ…ШЁЩҠЩӮЩҒШҙ
ЩҮЩ… Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҶ Ш№ШӘШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш© ЩҲШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶШіШЁШ§Щ„Щү Ш·ЩҒШҙ
Щ…ЩҒЩҠШҙ ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш© ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶШіШЁШ§Щ„ЩҠ Ш§ШіЩ…ЩҮШ§ Щ…Ш№Щ„Шҙ
 Ш§Ш®ШӘШ§Шұ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…Щғ ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘ Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩҠШ§ Щ…ШӘШ®ШұЩҒШҙ 
Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘШұЩ… ЩҮЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҮ ЩҲШ§ШҜЩҠЩ„ЩҮ Ш§ШӯШӘШұШ§Щ…ЩҮ 
 Ш§Щ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щү ЩҠШ¬ЩҠ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҮШ§ Ш§ЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩӮШ§Щ…ЩҮ
 ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҠЩҮЩ„ЩҒШ· ШЁЩғЩ„Щ…ЩҮ ЩҮШ§Ш¬Щү Ш§ЩӮШ·Ш№Щ„ЩҮ Щ„ШіШ§ЩҶЩҮ
Щ„ЩҲ ЩғЩҶШӘЩҲШ§ ЩғШӘЩҠШұ ШұЩ…Ш¶Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҖ Ш·ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ ЩҠШ·ШЁ Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ 

ШЁШ§ШөШө Щ„ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ЩҲЩ…ЩҒЩҠШҙ ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Ш¶ЩҠШ№ЩҮ
Ш§ШӘЩӮЩ„ Щ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠЩғЩ… ЩҠЩӮЩҒ ЩӮШҜШ§Щ…Щү ЩҲШ§ШіЩ…Ш№ЩҮ
Щ„Щ… ШөШӯШ§ШЁЩғ ЩҮШ§ШӘЩҮЩ…  ЩҠЩ„Ш§ ЩҠШҙШ¬Ш№ЩҲШ§
ЩҲШ§ЩҮШ§ЩҶШӘЩү Щ„ЩҠЩҮ ЩҮШӘЩҒЩҠШҜЩҮ ЩҠШ§ШЁЩҶЩҠ ШӘЩ„Щ…Ш№ЩҮ 
 Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШӘШҙШЁ ЩҲШЁШұШ¶ЩҮ Ш№Щ…ШұЩғ Щ…Ш§ ЩҮШӘШ·ЩҲЩ„ЩҶЩү 
Щ…ЩҒЩҠШҙ Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© ШЁЩҠЩҶЩҶШ§ Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠ ШӘЩғЩ„Щ…ЩҶЩү
ЩҠШ§ЩҲЩҠЩ„Щғ ЩҠШ§Щ„Щү ЩҮШӘЩҒЩғШұ ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠ ШӘШІШ§ЩҲЩ„ЩҶЩү 
 ЩҮШӘШӯШөЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щү ЩӮШЁЩ„Щғ  Щ…ЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠЩҮЩ… ЩғШ§ЩҶ ШӯЩ…Щ„Щү
